title: Acne

treatment_and_management.text: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports mapped acne terminology, distribution, lesion types, pain, scarring, hormonal patterns, prior products or treatment, and psychosocial impact.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for the Virtual Management of Acne

exact_section.heading: 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment and Clinical History

medication.text: Specifies lesion type and severity, skin type, scarring, hyperpigmentation, menstrual or androgen context, products, medicines, treatment history, and psychological impact.
medication.rationale: Supports mapped lesion type, comedones, papules, pustules, nodules, scarring, distribution, and clinician-reviewed hormonal or product context.
medication.evidence_extract: Specifies lesion type and severity, skin type, scarring, hyperpigmentation, menstrual or androgen context, products, medicines, treatment history, and psychological impact.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for the Virtual Management of Acne

medication.text: Provides clinician-led management, adherence, skin-care, medicine, and review context; dose-bearing details are not mapped.
medication.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-documented management, skin-care, medicine decisions, questions, and follow-up without doses.
medication.evidence_extract: Provides clinician-led management, adherence, skin-care, medicine, and review context; dose-bearing details are not mapped.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for the Virtual Management of Acne

referral.text: Lists scarring risk, depression or severe psychosocial impact, treatment non-response, endocrine concern, and severe or nodulocystic acne.
referral.rationale: Supports mapped severe or nodulocystic acne, scarring, psychosocial impact, referral, and return documentation.
referral.evidence_extract: Lists scarring risk, depression or severe psychosocial impact, treatment non-response, endocrine concern, and severe or nodulocystic acne.

source_limitations: Systemic symptoms, facial swelling, rapid worsening, generic infection signs, generic lesion colour or border, fixed four-to-six-week timing, and dose-bearing treatment remain unsupported.
Acne severity and acne vulgaris remain clinician-assessed; no autonomous treatment is generated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
